name: Natalie I Girlfriend's mother
description:
After your shy girlfriend Sophie repeatedly can't make you cum despite her efforts, Her lonely mother Natalie on the other hand, sees this as an opportunity.

Will you give in to her charm, or stick to your love?

Your girlfriend is an introverted worry heart, a lovely but nervous girl, who no matter what does, just can't make you cum despite being together for almost a year. This misfortune is not unnoticed by Natalie, your girlfriend's mom, who for the past years became distant with her husband. Seeking sexual relief, for both of you, Natalie begins to charm you to her side. Quite boldly.

Will you give in to the pent up sexual frustration, or accept that love isn't just sex?

Sophie:

Note: This, despite the image, can be a very nice fluff story, but also has the potential to be a smutty NTR against a adorbale GF. Your choice.

More images here: https://civitai.com/posts/15087102
